AC113-Ghanaur.executiveSummary: AC113 Ghanaur is a General category Assembly constituency in Patiala district, Malwa region, Punjab. It elected Gurlal Singh Ghanaur (AAP) in 2022 with a commanding margin of 31,765 votes — one of the highest margins in Patiala district. The constituency is predominantly rural with a significant Jat Sikh agrarian base and substantial SC population. Ghanaur has been a traditionally Congress/Akali area, but AAP swept it in 2022. The margin suggests strong AAP wave victory, but also potential vulnerability if anti-incumbency builds. The constituency is part of the Patiala Lok Sabha seat.

AC114-Sanour.executiveSummary: AC114 Sanour is a General category Assembly constituency in Patiala district, Malwa region, Punjab. It elected Harmeet Singh Pathanmajra (AAP) in 2022 with a massive margin of 49,122 votes — among the highest margins in Punjab. The current MLA Harmeet Singh Pathanmajra is a CRITICAL INTELLIGENCE CONCERN: he has been declared a proclaimed offender in a rape case, is on the run since September 2025, reportedly fled to Australia in November 2025, and was escaped from police custody in March 2026 after allegedly opening fire on cops. The constituency is predominantly rural with a Jat Sikh agrarian base. The MLA's criminal case has dominated recent political discourse. Congress must capitalize on this vulnerability while building alternative voter coalitions.

AC115-Patiala.executiveSummary: AC115 Patiala (also known as Patiala Urban) is a General category Assembly constituency in Patiala district, Malwa region, Punjab. It elected Ajitpal Singh Kohli (AAP) in 2022 with a margin of 19,873 votes, defeating former Chief Minister Amarinder Singh (Congress) who finished a distant third. This was the most high-profile result in Patiala district — the political titanic clash of the "Maharaja of Patiala" versus the Aam Aadmi Party. Kohli won 48,104 votes. The seat covers Patiala city proper. The current MLA has a complex political background: former Mayor of Patiala (2007-2012), former Akali Dal member, and now AAP MLA. The constituency is urban with diverse voters including traders, professionals, Scheduled Castes, and a significant urban poor population. This is a prestige seat for all parties and will be fiercely contested in 2027.

AC116-Samana.executiveSummary: AC116 Samana is a General category Assembly constituency in Patiala district, Malwa region, Punjab. It elected Chetan Singh Jouramajra (AAP) in 2022 with 74,375 votes, defeating former SAD MLA Surjit Singh Rakhra. The margin was decisive, with Jouramajra being a first-time MLA who surprised many by defeating a veteran Akali leader. The constituency is predominantly rural with a significant SC population and mixed Jat Sikh presence. Chetan Singh Jouramajra later became Punjab's Health Minister (and Irrigation/Mining Minister), making him a high-profile AAP MLA. He faced controversy in April 2025 when he publicly criticized school teachers at a government event and later apologized. He is a Class 12 pass, and his appointment as Health Minister was considered surprising by political observers.

AC117-Shutrana.executiveSummary: AC117 Shutrana is a Scheduled Caste (SC) reserved Assembly constituency in Patiala district, Malwa region, Punjab. It elected Kulwant Singh Bazigar (AAP) in 2022 with a massive margin of 51,554 votes — the second-highest margin in the Patiala district cluster. The constituency is predominantly rural with a majority SC population. The current MLA has faced serious criminal trouble: in October 2025, he and his two sons were booked for kidnapping and attempt to murder in Haryana. The MLA is a sweet shop owner (age 48, declared assets ₹18.60 lakh per Ballot Force) who was elected on an AAP ticket for the first time in 2022. The SCreserved status means only candidates from SC communities can contest. Congress and SAD both have strong claims to the SC vote bank in Malwa.
